story: Enzo wakes in orbit with amnesia, Red Death in his blood, and Obadiah for a voice. Memory returns: Ahab Zipkin used him in a vaccine test; only Enzo lived. Earth is dark; the grid is gone. To avoid infecting anyone, he and Obadiah pick the Livorno lazaret, a rock guarding the harbor, as their place to ride out quarantine. Down on that rock, a handful of wary survivors have sandbagged a hand-cranked gun and bolted a tin sign to the pier: “No approach without green quarantine beacon. Unauthorized docking will be fired upon.” Enzo descends toward the island’s empty quay.
implausible_knowledge: Down on that rock, a handful of wary survivors have sandbagged a hand-cranked gun and bolted a tin sign to the pier: “No approach without green quarantine beacon. Unauthorized docking will be fired upon.”
question: As Enzo’s capsule arrives at the lazaret, what will he most likely do when he reaches the pier?
answer_with_knowledge: Hold off offshore and signal for permission, waiting for a green quarantine beacon before docking.
answer_without_knowledge: Moor at the pier and step out to begin quarantine.
